prediction.chief_complaint: left ankle injury after rolling it playing basketball
plan: RICE: rest, ice 20 minutes every 2 to 3 hours for first 48 hours, compression with ACE wrap, elevation
ibuprofen 400 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain and swelling
weight-bear as tolerated, crutches if needed
begin ankle range-of-motion exercises in a few days
return for imaging if not improving in 7 to 10 days
